details.test: Task 1: Cheapest SSO-enabled plan (25 users monthly) and start trial
Task 2: Request demo for 120-employee healthcare company
Task 3: E-commerce case study with >=15% conversion uplift
Task 4: Compare three CRM integrations with two-way sync
Task 5: Custom quote for 80 users annual with Priority Support & Advanced Analytics
Task 6: Subscribe to product updates newsletter for Europe
Task 8: Register for earliest upcoming onboarding webinar within next 30 days
Task 9: ROI calculator for 50-person team and email result
